goal: Weekly/Monthly achievement requirement lines said vague 'Once this week/month' instead of telling the user what to do
done: earn() in js/achievements-panel.js: Weekly 'Ask a question this week'/'ถามไพ่สัปดาห์นี้', Monthly 'Do a Celtic Cross this month'/'เปิดเซลติกครอสเดือนนี้'

goal: Mobile Full/Celtic reading: staff cards 7-10 rendered as badges only (no art) and the #1/#2 cross split apart
done: Scoped the reading.css staff grid-area override to desktop (min-width:641px) so mobile uses the correct col-5 staff from styles.css; tightened the mobile celtic column-gap 26->14px so the 5-col grid fits narrow viewports
root_cause: reading.css forced the staff into grid column 4 with no media query; on the mobile 5-col grid col 4 is a collapsing flex-gap (styles.css intends staff in col 5), so staff cards collapsed to ~0 width and only the absolutely-positioned badges showed. The fixed tracks (4x52 + 4x26px gaps = 312px) also overflowed a real ~390px viewport once padding/safe-area were subtracted, pushing the staff column off-screen and distorting the centre cross
fix: desktop-scope the staff reorder + reduce mobile column gap
verified: static repro with the real CSS confirms the staff moves to col5 flush-right and renders; final on-device check still needed (headless/MCP capped the viewport at 500px so a true <500px render was not reproducible)

goal: Celtic share poster: remove the duplicated hero line + filler subtitle and rebalance the spread; reduce poster-generation failures users hit on download
done: Header: dropped the hero affirmation (duplicated the closing narration sentence) and the 'A 10-card spread...' subtitle; pulled the spread up, enlarged cards (146x232), tightened the cross<->staff mid gap. Reliability: parallel-preload all 10 card images before the draw loop; skip expanding -200 thumbs into non-existent .h1080/.h900 variants (was 2 failed 404s per card); auto-retry buildPoster once on failure/timeout in share.js before showing the error UI
verified: real EN+TH renders via share/poster-preview/celtic-harness — header decluttered, spread fits the shell above the narration, all card art loads
